notable_excerpts: The EV business delivered its highest ever quarterly market share of 11.7%, which is up 6.8% year-on-year, riding on the success of Vida VX2.
Dow Jones Sustainability Index score further improved to 75 in FY'25 from 69 in FY'24, reflecting HMCL's leadership towards sustainable business growth.
We are definitely very much for the safety of the customers, and we continue to drive our technology for the vehicle engineering, to see that we come up with the most optimum cost-effective solution.
We are delighted to announce the appointment of Mr. Harshavardhan Chitale, our new Chief Executive Officer effective January '26.
Umang Khurana, Chief Risk Officer and Head - Investor Relations

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted Hero MotoCorp's focus on environmental sustainability through its EV business and improved sustainability index score. Social aspects were less emphasized, with some mention of customer safety. Governance was addressed through leadership changes and risk management roles.
strengths: Strong focus on EV market expansion
